message:
test(validate): add unit tests for validateDelta function

- Test skip behavior for non-add delta types
- Test skip behavior when validation disabled in config
- Test skip behavior for content too short (<15 chars)
- Test skip behavior for empty content
- Test decision log content preview
- Test decision log for update delta type

Closes: cass_memory_system-uugk
